opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Water got in my ear in the shower, and suddenly it went completely deaf and started throbbing intensely.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My hearing dropped out suddenly after a shower and there's loud ringing — I'm scared it's permanent.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden this evening after a shower, on a background of 3 weeks of mild fullness
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: muffled hearing, ringing, a reflex dry cough, slight imbalance; no discharge, no spinning vertigo

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; used a cotton bud after the shower

objective_data_offered.value: sudden muffled/blocked hearing right ear with ringing
